items_flat.title_en: Google DeepMind Essay: AI Agents and the New Validation Bottleneck in Science
items_flat.title_zh: Google DeepMind 論文：AI 代理與科學中的新驗證瓶頸
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind published the essay 'Conjecture Machines: AI agents and the new validation bottleneck in science.' It describes how AI agents, powered by frontier models and scaffolding, are transforming scientific workflows by generating abundant hypotheses and candidate solutions at low cost. However, physical and institutional validation (experiments, peer review) remains slow and expensive, creating a widening bottleneck. The essay outlines four urgent priorities for policymakers and funders: giving scientists access to tools, making data agent-ready, expanding experimental infrastructure, and updating peer review processes.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 發表論文〈Conjecture Machines：AI 代理與科學中的新驗證瓶頸〉。論文指出，AI 代理在前沿模型與 scaffolding 支持下，正改變科學工作流程，能低成本大量產生假設與候選解。但物理與制度性的驗證（實驗、同儕審查）仍緩慢且昂貴，形成日益擴大的瓶頸。論文提出四項急迫優先事項供政策制定者與資助者參考：讓科學家取得工具、讓資料適合代理使用、擴展實驗基礎設施，以及更新同儕審查流程。
items_flat.quote: AI agents are conjecture machines, making ideas and candidate solutions abundant and relatively cheap. Refutations remain physical and institutional — and so, costly and slow. AI agents present at least four urgent new priorities: 1. Scientists need access to the tools. 2. The tools need access to agent-ready data. 3. We need more experimental infrastructure to validate AI ideas. 4. And we need to update the peer review process.
items_flat.quote_zh: AI 代理是猜想機器，讓想法與候選解豐富且相對便宜。反駁仍屬物理與制度層面，因此成本高昂且緩慢。AI 代理至少提出四項急迫的新優先事項：1. 科學家需要取得這些工具。2. 工具需要取得適合代理使用的資料。3. 我們需要更多實驗基礎設施來驗證 AI 想法。4. 我們需要更新同儕審查流程。

google.title_en: Google DeepMind Essay: AI Agents and the New Validation Bottleneck in Science
google.title_zh: Google DeepMind 論文：AI 代理與科學中的新驗證瓶頸
google.summary_en: Google DeepMind published the essay 'Conjecture Machines: AI agents and the new validation bottleneck in science.' It describes how AI agents, powered by frontier models and scaffolding, are transforming scientific workflows by generating abundant hypotheses and candidate solutions at low cost. However, physical and institutional validation (experiments, peer review) remains slow and expensive, creating a widening bottleneck. The essay outlines four urgent priorities for policymakers and funders: giving scientists access to tools, making data agent-ready, expanding experimental infrastructure, and updating peer review processes.

google.quote: AI agents are conjecture machines, making ideas and candidate solutions abundant and relatively cheap. Refutations remain physical and institutional — and so, costly and slow. AI agents present at least four urgent new priorities: 1. Scientists need access to the tools. 2. The tools need access to agent-ready data. 3. We need more experimental infrastructure to validate AI ideas. 4. And we need to update the peer review process.
google.quote_zh: AI 代理是猜想機器，讓想法與候選解豐富且相對便宜。反駁仍屬物理與制度層面，因此成本高昂且緩慢。AI 代理至少提出四項急迫的新優先事項：1. 科學家需要取得這些工具。2. 工具需要取得適合代理使用的資料。3. 我們需要更多實驗基礎設施來驗證 AI 想法。4. 我們需要更新同儕審查流程。

brief_en: Google DeepMind published an essay on AI agents as 'conjecture machines' accelerating scientific discovery while creating a validation bottleneck in real-world testing. It outlines four priorities for policymakers and funders. No other major announcements or model releases from OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, or xAI in the last 12 hours.
brief_zh: Google DeepMind 發表論文，探討 AI 代理作為「猜想機器」加速科學發現，卻造成現實驗證瓶頸，並提出四項政策與資助優先事項。過去12小時內 OpenAI、Anthropic、Meta 及 xAI 無其他重大宣布或模型發布。
